_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: At 12 months post-transplantation 50% (2/4) of the animals had retained Thy1-GFP+ cells...donor cell survival was determined to range from 0.5% to 5%
details: Donor RGCs survived up to 12 months post-transplantation with 50% (2/4) of animals retaining Thy1-GFP+ cells at 12 months, with donor cell survival ranging from 0.5% to 5% of transplanted cells
